_about: CC-4 external authority: the Dev Container specification (containers.dev) and the OCI image specification. Each case is a devcontainer.json and whether the specification accepts it — at most one container image source (`image`, `build`, or `dockerComposeFile`) may be declared (none ⇒ the implementor's default base image, as in Codespaces), and known properties must be well-formed. The CC-4 witness (crates/holospaces/tests/cc4_devcontainer.rs) checks holospaces' Dev Container ingestor agrees with these accept/reject decisions, and that ingesting the same source yields the same holospace κ (reproducibility, QS1 / Q4). See vv/PROVENANCE.md.
